title: Simply World Map
description: A new worldmap mod that adds a worldmap to the game thats client side
body:
Simply World Map is (like said in the name) a world map mod that is currently being made, its still in the early stages so it only has the base features: a map ofcourse but also a easy teleport button. There are many plans on improving it. Plans like heatmaps to make this mod stand out from others! If you have any questions or bugs, please report them in the discord server!!!

**Key info:**

- how to open the map: M is the default

- How to use this in an existing world: in the top of your screen you have a button, if you click on it a small pop-up will open, there you can load the map with the region files inside your world!!! (that could take a while)
